name: AI Content & SEO Workflow — Topic to Ghost Post

parameters.jsonBody:
={ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 4096, "temperature": 0.7, "system": "You are an expert blog writer. TASK Expand the provided outline into a complete blog post. LENGTH 600-900 words total. Aim for the middle of that range. OUTPUT FORMAT (CRITICAL) Return ONLY clean HTML — no markdown, no code fences, no preamble, no closing remarks. Use ONLY these tags: -

for section headings (do NOT include the H1 title — Ghost renders the title separately) -

for paragraphs -

  • for bullet lists where appropriate WRITING RULES - Write for the stated target audience. - No fluff, no 'in this article we will...' opener. Lead with value in the first sentence. - Use short paragraphs (2-4 sentences each). - Use bullet lists when listing 3+ items. - End with a brief practical takeaway, NOT a generic 'in conclusion' paragraph. - Write in the requested language.", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Outline (JSON): {{ $('Claude — Research & Outline').item.json.content[0].text }} Language: {{ $('Webhook (form submit)').item.json.body.language || 'English' }} Return the full blog post HTML now." } ] }

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "ok": true,
  "title": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Ghost Payload').item.json.title) }},
  "excerpt": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Ghost Payload').item.json.excerpt) }},
  "metaTitle": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Ghost Payload').item.json.metaTitle) }},
  "metaDescription": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Ghost Payload').item.json.metaDescription) }},
  "slug": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Ghost Payload').item.json.slug) }},
  "focusKeywords": {{ JSON.stringify($('Assemble Ghost Payload').item.json.focusKeywords) }},
  "postUrl": {{ JSON.stringify($('Ghost — Create Post').item.json.url) }},
  "postId": {{ JSON.stringify($('Ghost — Create Post').item.json.id) }},
  "status": {{ JSON.stringify($('Ghost — Create Post').item.json.status) }},
  "timing": { "totalMs": {{ Date.now() - ($('Assemble Ghost Payload').item.json.startTs || Date.now()) }} }
}
